41(P8)Physician Orders CHAR 2 Indicates the number of days during the last 14-day period in which a physician has changed the patient's orders.
162 T1B T1B_ORDER_THPY 42a(T1b)Ordered Therapies CHAR 1 Indicates if the physician ordered any of the therapy services to begin in the first 14 days of stay: physical therapy, occupational therapy, or speech pathology services. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space
163 T1C T1C_THPY_DAYS 42b(T1c)Ordered Therapies - Days CHAR 2 Estimated number of
